summary: Push Notifications & Kids Check-in UI Testing Complete - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: VAPID key endpoint, push subscribe/unsubscribe all working (9/9 tests passed). Frontend: Duolingo-style Kids Zone with DiceBear avatars, 3-step wizard, all UI elements functioning correctly.

vapid_public_key_endpoint.details: Returns valid VAPID public key from environment

push_subscribe_endpoint.details: Correctly requires authentication (401 without auth), stores subscription with auth

push_unsubscribe_endpoint.details: Correctly requires authentication (401 without auth), removes subscription with auth

notification_bell_ui.details: Bell icon visible in portal header, clickable, triggers usePushNotifications hook

service_worker_push.details: sw.js contains push event handler and notificationclick handler

duolingo_style_header.details: Green header (#58CC02) with 'Kids Zone' title and 'Sunday School Adventures' subtitle

dicebear_avatars.details: Adventurer style avatars from api.dicebear.com loading for all children

nunito_font.details: Nunito font family applied throughout page

add_child_button.details: '+Add Child' button in header opens modal

add_child_modal.details: Modal contains: Name*, Birthdate*, Allergies, Special Needs, Emergency Contact (Name & Phone), DiceBear avatar preview

add_child_functionality.details: Successfully added TEST_Sarah Explorer, toast notification shown, child appears in grid

child_cards.details: Cards show: DiceBear avatar, name, age, character badge (Champion/Star/etc), allergy warnings with icon

checkin_wizard_cta.details: 'Ready for Sunday School? Tap here to check in your kids' banner visible when unchecked children exist

wizard_step_1.details: 'Who's checking in today?' with tap-to-select children and progress indicators

wizard_step_2.details: Confirm screen showing selected children with details, Back and 'Check In Now' buttons

wizard_step_3.details: 'All Set! Show these codes at pickup' with QR codes, pickup codes in orange, Done button

checked_in_state.details: Green 'Checked In' pill, dark pickup code box with gold numbers, check-in time shown

summary_bar.details: Bottom bar shows '3 children in Sunday School' with notification message

login_flow.details: Login successful, navigates to portal, Kids Check-in accessible via nav

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_push_notifications_kids_iter24.py - Created 9 tests for push notifications and kids check-in API
seed_data_creation: Added TEST_Sarah Explorer child, TEST_Tommy Test was added by previous test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notifications backend endpoints fully working. Kids Check-in UI redesigned with Duolingo/Veggie Tales aesthetic - green header, DiceBear adventurer avatars, Nunito font, 3-step wizard, character badges. All 3 test children are currently checked in. Note: Console showed 'Failed to fetch tenant' and 'Failed to fetch member data' errors during page navigation but these did not affect functionality.
